g.text: Footprint geometry scales globally through automated extraction (Google, Microsoft); decision-relevant height rides almost entirely on OpenStreetMap community mapping and US public Lidar - a supply-demand mismatch.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 10px; font-family: 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: C Many providers map footprints; only three supply height (measured from per-feature provenance)
